arts.ttl: Hollywood star and Arsenal super-fan Anne Hathaway welcomes back Bukayo Saka on Instagram as Gunners winger makes dream return from injury
arts.sum: Hollywood star Anne Hathaway took to Instagram on Tuesday night to send a special message to Bukayo Saka after he made a triumphant return from injury.

arts.ttl: £37m asking price: Arsenal, Man Utd & Chelsea on alert as transfer plan in place
arts.sum: Arsenal, Manchester United and Chelsea are reportedly among the clubs on alert for the potential transfer of Juventus striker Dusan Vlahovic. It looks increasingly like a decision has already been made for Vlahovic to leave Juve this summer, and the Premier League could be his next destination. arts.ttl: Ian Wright raises season-ending injury fear as Mikel Arteta suffers fresh Arsenal blow
arts.sum: Gabriel Magalhaes was forced off with a hamstring injury in Arsenal's 2-1 win over Fulham and Gunners legend Ian Wright is concerned the defender's season may be over

arts.ttl: Every word Mikel Arteta said on Bukayo Saka return, Arsenal injuries and Gabriel replacement
arts.sum: The win, however, was marred by what looked a significant hamstring injury for Gabriel Magalhaes, while Jurrien Timber was also unable to finish the game after a collision with Raul Jimenez in the first half took its toll on the full-back. It is a worry with now less than a week until Real Madrid come to town that he will have to have some unorthodox players in different roles.
